name_cn:
666013Hobo Bag
💫MCM💫The body of this medium-sized Aren Hobo shoulder bag is made of Visetos, with Nappa leather decoration🔬adding rich design layers and highlighting the classic charm of the brand's traditional pattern.
Size: Approx. 19.5 x 25.0 x 5.0 cm
